title: Plan and evaluate burning for fuel, ecological and cultural resource management
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and evaluate burning for fuel, ecological and cultural resource management demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess a designated site/area for planned burning

pcs.text: Locate, assess and record accumulated fuel, cultural heritage and environmental assets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate, assess and record accumulated fuel, cultural heritage and environmental assets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate, assess and record accumulated fuel, cultural heritage and environmental assets.

pcs.text: Locate, assess and record reference areas, experimental plots, populations of flora and fauna that may be affected by fire
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate, assess and record reference areas, experimental plots, populations of flora and fauna that may be affected by fire?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate, assess and record reference areas, experimental plots, populations of flora and fauna that may be affected by fire.

pcs.text: Assess and record potential impacts on natural and cultural heritage assets from planned burn preparation and burning activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and record potential impacts on natural and cultural heritage assets from planned burn preparation and burning activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and record potential impacts on natural and cultural heritage assets from planned burn preparation and burning activities.

pcs.text: Assess potential risks and hazards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess potential risks and hazards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess potential risks and hazards.

pcs.text: Identify the history of previous burns on site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the history of previous burns on site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the history of previous burns on site.

pcs.text: Identify legislation, regulations and codes of practice relevant to planned burn preparation and activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify legislation, regulations and codes of practice relevant to planned burn preparation and activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify legislation, regulations and codes of practice relevant to planned burn preparation and activities.

pcs.text: Assess the suitability of target site for fuel reduction burns
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the suitability of target site for fuel reduction burns?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the suitability of target site for fuel reduction burns.

pcs.text: Identify alternative strategies where fuel reduction burns are not favourable
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify alternative strategies where fuel reduction burns are not favourable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify alternative strategies where fuel reduction burns are not favourable.

pcs.text: Determine resources and equipment required to implement the planned burn
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine resources and equipment required to implement the planned burn?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine resources and equipment required to implement the planned burn.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess a designated site/area for planned burning

elements.title: Plan burn

pcs.text: Conduct site assessments to confirm selection of target sites for planned burning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct site assessments to confirm selection of target sites for planned burning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct site assessments to confirm selection of target sites for planned burning.

pcs.text: Establish objectives for fuel reduction, ecological and cultural heritage protection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish objectives for fuel reduction, ecological and cultural heritage protection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish objectives for fuel reduction, ecological and cultural heritage protection.

pcs.text: Select strategies and tactics suitable for the area and consistent with the planned burn objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select strategies and tactics suitable for the area and consistent with the planned burn objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select strategies and tactics suitable for the area and consistent with the planned burn objectives.

pcs.text: Assess wildfire hazards and risks of selected strategies and tactics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess wildfire hazards and risks of selected strategies and tactics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess wildfire hazards and risks of selected strategies and tactics.

pcs.text: Conduct consultation and ongoing liaison with stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct consultation and ongoing liaison with stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct consultation and ongoing liaison with stakeholders.

pcs.text: Confirm planning addresses workplace health and safety, protection of life, property, assets and environment and complies with legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm planning addresses workplace health and safety, protection of life, property, assets and environment and complies with legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm planning addresses workplace health and safety, protection of life, property, assets and environment and complies with legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Develop objectives and procedures for monitoring ecological response to burn
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop objectives and procedures for monitoring ecological response to burn?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop objectives and procedures for monitoring ecological response to burn.

pcs.text: Confirm required resources and the optimum timing to reduce risk are included in burn planning process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm required resources and the optimum timing to reduce risk are included in burn planning process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm required resources and the optimum timing to reduce risk are included in burn planning process.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Plan burn

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collate and record pre-burn site assessment of fire history and frequency for post-burn benchmarking.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess, evaluate and record habitat conditions pre-burn for monitoring program.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess, evaluate and record fuel hazard data and pre-burn conditions for monitoring program.

pcs.text: Establish and record baseline site conditions for ongoing monitoring

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish and record baseline site conditions for ongoing monitoring.

pcs.text: Document a program for post-burn site monitoring and evaluation

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document a program for post-burn site monitoring and evaluation.

elements.title: Conduct post-burn monitoring and evaluation

pcs.text: Conduct post-burn monitoring and evaluation of burn site

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct post-burn monitoring and evaluation of burn site.

pcs.text: Assess outcomes of planned burn against established objectives for fuel management and protection of ecological and cultural heritage assets

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess outcomes of planned burn against established objectives for fuel management and protection of ecological and cultural heritage assets.

pcs.text: Document and report monitoring and evaluation findings

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and report monitoring and evaluation findings.

pcs.text: Develop recommendations based on information from monitoring and evaluation activities according to legislation, regulations, codes of practice and workplace obligations

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop recommendations based on information from monitoring and evaluation activities according to legislation, regulations, codes of practice and workplace obligations.
